phonetic: 藢ri藧藢k蓱藧mp蓹藞z瑟蕛蓹n
phoneticUs: 藢ri藧藢k蓱藧mp蓹藞z瑟蕛蓹n
examples: His representative work is piano recomposition.
Note that the dynamic recomposition in terms of building composite applications out of existing services is key.
Nineteenth-century classical composers were great fans of recomposition, some of it flamboyantly transformational, as in Franz Liszt's florid transcriptions for solo piano of Franz Schubert's songs.
